description:
A front desk receptionist at Hillside Family Medicine needs to update the primary insurance information for patient Maria Gonzalez (DOB: April 12, 1978). Add the following primary insurance details to her existing chart:

- Insurance Plan Name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts
- Insurance ID Number: BCB993847210
- Insurance Group: GRP-55128
- Policyholder/Subscriber: Self (Maria Gonzalez, DOB: 1978-04-12)
- Copay: $30
- Insurance Order: Primary

The patient already exists in the system — do NOT create a new patient.

metadata.expected_plan_name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts
